text: CLOSE RATIONALE: R-CMD-check run 28590936006 (commit 6827e3a) GREEN on ALL jobs — macos/windows/ubuntu-release/ubuntu-devel + fast-gates — first full pass in the workflow's history (previously 0 for 8 runs since April). Fix chain: 6372bd4 (policy leak, irlba guard, source-tree finder, chol_factor NaN, em-dash, undocumented methods, \method markup), 5fbbe68 (CI: reinstall CRAN Suggests dropped by dependencies=hard; toolchain testthat/knitr/rmarkdown were missing — only green leg had been riding a stale cache), b121f81 (src/Makevars{,.win}: explicit $(LAPACK_LIBS) $(BLAS_LIBS); Windows DLL link failed on dgemm_/dgeqrf_ symbols Unix linkers tolerate), 6827e3a (contained-probe child launch on Windows: system2(env=) pastes VAR=value as literal args on Windows, child never launched; now set R_LIBS in parent). Follow-up filed: determinant() dispatch gap without Matrix attached (bd-01KWHDRQV6BX162NSXQP5DWAAC).
